amenities: Spacious Bathroom with Bathtub and Rain Shower
Feather Duvet and 100% Cotton Bed Linens
description: Indulge in comfort and sophistication in our tastefully appointed Moonlight Room.
longerDescription: Spanning 60 sqm, the Moonlight Room offers a private haven with stylish features and furnishings. Designed for ultimate relaxation, the space includes a king-size bed with premium Sealy mattresses, a spacious bathroom featuring a deep-soak bathtub, a refreshing rain shower, and exclusive designer amenities. Whether you're here for a romantic getaway or a quiet retreat, this room provides the perfect blend of modern luxury and cozy ambiance.

amenities: Spacious Bathroom with Bathtub and Rain Shower
Feather Duvet and 100% Cotton Bed Linens
description: Experience spacious comfort perfect for families and group stays.
longerDescription: Spanning 95 sqm, the Twilight Cozy Room offers generous living space designed for relaxation and convenience. Ideal for up to four guests, the room features two comfortable beds, a well-appointed bathroom, and thoughtfully arranged interiors that create a warm and cozy atmosphere. Whether you're traveling with family or friends, this room provides the perfect balance of comfort and functionality for a memorable stay.

amenities: Spacious Bathroom with Bathtub and Rain Shower
Feather Duvet and 100% Cotton Bed Linens
description: A spacious and elegant retreat designed for comfort and relaxation.
longerDescription: Spanning 140 sqm, the Starlight Family Room offers an expansive private haven ideal for a comfortable and relaxing stay. Designed to accommodate up to two guests, the room features three premium beds, a spacious full bathroom with a deep-soak bathtub and rain shower, and refined interiors that create a warm and luxurious ambiance. Whether you're planning a peaceful escape or a stylish staycation, this room blends space, elegance, and comfort seamlessly.

amenities: Feather Duvet and 100% Cotton Bed Linens
description: An ultra-spacious luxury suite crafted for elevated living.
longerDescription: Spanning 180 sqm, the Midnight Bliss Suite offers a grand and sophisticated retreat designed for up to five guests. Featuring four premium beds, two full bathrooms, and expansive living space, this suite is perfect for families, executive stays, or luxury getaways. With refined interiors, elegant finishes, and high-end amenities, it delivers the ultimate blend of comfort, privacy, and prestige.

amenities: Five Premium Beds with Luxury Headboards
Feather Duvet and 100% Cotton Bed Linens
description: An ultra-spacious premier suite crafted for grand living and elevated comfort.
longerDescription: Spanning an impressive 200 sqm, the Lunar Deluxe Suite offers an expansive and refined retreat designed to accommodate up to six guests. Featuring five premium beds, three full bathrooms, and generous living and dining spaces, this suite is ideal for large families, executive gatherings, or luxurious extended stays. Elegant interiors, curated furnishings, and enhanced premium amenities create a sophisticated atmosphere that blends privacy, comfort, and prestige.

amenities: Six Premium Beds with Luxury Upholstery
Feather Duvet and 100% Cotton Bed Linens
description: Our most expansive and prestigious family suite, designed for grand gatherings and exceptional stays.
longerDescription: Spanning an extraordinary 350 sqm, the Celestial Family Suite offers an unparalleled luxury experience for up to eight guests. Featuring six premium beds, four full bathrooms, multiple living areas, and an elegant dining space, this suite is ideal for large families, special celebrations, or executive retreats. Refined interiors, grand proportions, and thoughtfully curated amenities ensure comfort, privacy, and sophistication at the highest level.
